title: Kenji Lee - Musical Work in the Time of COVID-19 - Oral History Transcript
creator: Labor Archives of Washington, University of Washington Libraries Special Collections
description: Oral History interview with jazz saxophonist Kenji Lee and about musical work during the COVID-19 pandemic completed in June 2020. This interview is part of the Working in the Time of COVID-19 Oral History Project by the Labor Archives of Washington, University of Washington Libraries. Laborarchives.org This item contains two parts: oral history audio file and full text transcription (.pdf).
